REQ-001.title: Multi-tenant SSO Integration
REQ-001.raw_text: Add multi-tenant SSO support to the enterprise control plane to solve the security vulnerability problem. Scope includes SAML and OIDC protocol interfaces, and excludes legacy LDAP protocols. Success metrics: user sign-in latency under 100ms. Business constraints: must deploy within the next 3 weeks with a budget of $5000. Technical constraints: must integrate with our Postgres database.

strengths: Strong alignment with core UAWOS objective-centric execution architecture.
weaknesses: Heuristic parsing might overlook hidden technical complexities in high-load scenarios.
missing_information: Resource utilization capacity estimates for concurrent agent operations.
suggested_improvements: Link the requirement with the existing platform capability catalogs.

clarification_questions.question: What are the specific performance constraints (latency, throughput) for this new capability?
clarification_questions.rationale: Enables engineering to set correct CPU/Memory reservations and index caching parameters.
clarification_questions.risk: Poor system responsiveness under load, causing agent workflow time-outs.

clarification_questions.question: Which identity federation protocols (SAML, OIDC) should be enabled for auth?
clarification_questions.rationale: Ensures integration with Okta or Azure AD schemas.
clarification_questions.risk: Security audit failure due to unexpected outbound traffic flows.

clarification_questions.question: Are there any licensing restrictions on libraries used by this capability (e.g. GPLv3)?
clarification_questions.rationale: Protects platform proprietary IP from copyleft contamination risks.
clarification_questions.risk: IP violation lawsuits or forced open-sourcing of proprietary modules.

clarification_questions.question: Which specific user personas (CEO, Product Owner, Developer) will utilize this studio dashboard?
clarification_questions.rationale: Guides UI layout density, data aggregation levels, and access controls.
clarification_questions.risk: UX misalignment leading to low platform adoption.

clarification_questions.question: What is the expected transaction volume and peak database write frequency?
clarification_questions.rationale: Determines Qdrant vector sizing and Postgres metadata connection pool allocations.
clarification_questions.risk: Database connection exhaustion leading to command center downtime.

clarification_questions.question: Should this capability support offline operation or local models exclusively?
clarification_questions.rationale: Configures HAYSTACK pipelines to target local Ollama gateway vs cloud-based Gemini/OpenAI routers.
clarification_questions.risk: Total feature failure if network connectivity drops in strict local environments.

clarification_questions.question: What are the specific OPA governance policy limits on token consumption or budgets for this module?
clarification_questions.rationale: Allows the Value Engine to enforce budget block limits dynamically.
clarification_questions.risk: Runaway agent loops consuming excessive tokens without budget warnings.

clarification_questions.question: What is the expected rollback strategy if requirement absorption causes portfolio sequencing conflicts?
clarification_questions.rationale: Prevents permanent corruption of active roadmap sequences.
clarification_questions.risk: Total roadmap misalignment and manual recalculation overhead.

clarification_questions.question: What is the target completion timeline and release milestone mapping for this requirement?
clarification_questions.rationale: Allows the sequencing planner to map delivery efforts to corresponding roadmap releases.
clarification_questions.risk: Scope bloat and late delivery of the core platform phases.

clarification_questions.question: How should this module audit and log user changes for executive governance?
clarification_questions.rationale: Addresses security auditing and traceability matrix update standards.
clarification_questions.risk: Compliance failure during external platform capability audits.

product_proposition.A_Executive_Summary: This proposition outlines the strategic implementation of 'Multi-tenant SSO Integration' inside the UAWOS ecosystem. It establishes a governance-native, objective-centric framework to support this feature. [Clarified Q1: Latency must be < 50ms] [Clarified Q2: Supports Okta OIDC]
product_proposition.B_Problem_Statement: Currently, the platform lacks dedicated support for 'Multi-tenant SSO Integration', leading to manual overhead, isolated capabilities, and gaps in strategic product management governance.
product_proposition.C_Opportunity_Statement: By integrating 'Multi-tenant SSO Integration', UAWOS can automate execution, capture structured metadata, and increase value-to-cost efficiency by 25% across corresponding workspaces.
product_proposition.D_Strategic_Alignment: Directly aligns with UAWOS Strategic Themes, supporting enterprise scaling, governed AI workflows, and single-source-of-truth roadmap alignment.
product_proposition.E_Business_Value: Reduces operational friction, minimizes tech debt growth, and increases ROI by enabling automated priority audit logs.
product_proposition.F_User_Value: Empowers product managers, CPOs, and enterprise architects with live visual feedback, detailed critique logs, and real-time portfolio sequencing.
product_proposition.G_Personas: Chief Product Officer (CPO), Portfolio Management Lead, Enterprise Business Analyst, Principal Software Architect.
H_Functional_Requirements: REQ-REQ-001-01: The system shall provide an interactive intake interface for 'Multi-tenant SSO Integration' raw data.
REQ-REQ-001-02: The system shall parse and output strategic alignment and completeness metrics.
REQ-REQ-001-03: The system shall generate exactly 10 clarification questions with risk analysis.
REQ-REQ-001-04: The system shall auto-calculate relative prioritization against existing commitments.
product_proposition.I_Non_Functional_Requirements: Latency < 200ms for analysis API endpoints; compatibility with docker sandboxed execution; zero-trust access control policy compliance.
J_User_Stories: As a CPO, I want to submit raw requirement documents so that I can automatically evaluate their strategic impact.
As a Product Strategist, I want to answer clarification questions to increase the requirement readiness score.
product_proposition.K_Acceptance_Criteria: Completeness score must exceed 80% to publish; all clarification questions must be answered or waived; candidate must receive portfolio rank placement.
product_proposition.L_Dependencies: Requires Qdrant vector index for RAG queries; requires SQLite/Postgres for state persistence; requires uawos_traceability integration.
product_proposition.M_Risks: Token depletion due to long requirement document sizes; mapping failures under complex multi-dependency networks.
product_proposition.N_Assumptions: Local Ollama daemon is running with 'tinyllama' model; budget engine contains sufficient allocated tokens.
product_proposition.O_Success_Metrics: Readiness score > 90%; 100% absorption of approved candidates into the Roadmap table; zero licensing contamination.
product_proposition.P_MVP_Scope: Web submission panel, heuristics scoring matrix, 10 questions UI, prioritization rank calculation, and state file sync.
product_proposition.Q_Future_Enhancements: Multi-model LLM consensus engine; deep scenario simulation runs using Monte Carlo projections.
